name: implement_debug_core
full_help:
implement_debug_core

Description: 
Implement debug core

Syntax: 
implement_debug_core  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<cores>...]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<cores>]   Debug core

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
